name: Fluence Corporation Limited
description: Fluence Corporation Limited is a global leader in decentralized water, wastewater, and reuse treatment solutions. The company provides local, sustainable, and fast-to-deploy water treatment technologies, including its proprietary Membrane Aerated Biofilm Reactor (MABR) and NIROBOX smart packaged systems. Fluence serves municipal, industrial, and commercial clients worldwide, delivering high-efficiency water treatment and reuse solutions that reduce energy consumption and environmental impact.
